name: Villa / Bungalow
about: ashjkj

name: Mantra One Residency

developer.name: Mantra Developers
developer.description: Step into elevated living at Mantra One Residences by Burgundy – The Luxury Line, where design, scale, and sophistication come together at Magarpatta Road, Pune. Mantra One Residences is a landmark with five iconic towers, each 37 floors high, with just four residences per floor for unmatched privacy. Spread across a total land parcel of 10 acres—8.5 acres residential and 1.5 acres commercial—Mantra One Residences delivers a thoughtfully balanced lifestyle. At Mantra One Residences, discover expansive 3.5 and 4.5 BHK residences alongside ultra-luxurious 6.5 BHK garden villas, crafted for refined living. Every space at Mantra One Residences reflects modern elegance and timeless detail. Positioned in Magarpatta City, Mantra One Residences ensures seamless connectivity to Solapur Highway and Pune Nagar Highway. With panoramic skyline views and curated experiences, Mantra One Residences redefines urban luxury and is a true symbol of iconic living.

about: Mantra One Residency offers premium 2 & 3 BHK homes in Wakad, Pune with excellent connectivity to Hinjewadi IT Park and Mumbai-Pune Expressway.

name: Mantra Mayfair

developer.name: Mantra Developers
developer.description: Trusted builder in Pune with 12+ successful projects.

about: Mantra Mayfair River Residences redefines riverside luxury at Koregaon Park Annex with ultra-spacious 3 and 4 BHK homes crafted for refined urban living. Set along a serene riverfront, Mantra Mayfair River Residences blends natural calm with modern sophistication in one of Pune’s most prestigious neighbourhoods. Designed and styled by Burgundy, Mantra Mayfair River Residences showcases striking architecture and an elevated lifestyle experience. Residents enjoy curated amenities including a Pilates studio, luxury spa retreat, culinary pavilion, M Café, gaming den, and a private cinema lounge, all complemented by an imperial entrance. Located in Upper Koregaon Park, Mantra Mayfair River Residences offers seamless connectivity to Pune’s prime hubs. With Magarpatta City close by, Mantra Mayfair River Residences delivers the perfect balance of convenience and tranquillity. More than just a home, Mantra Mayfair River Residences stands as a bold statement of elevated living and timeless luxury.

name: Mantra Meridian

developer.name: Mantra Developers
developer.description: Award-winning developer with focus on quality and innovation.

about: Discover Mantra Meridian, a premium 12-acre residential development in the heart of Balewadi, Pune. Just steps away from the serene Holy River, this landmark project offers an exquisite collection of 2, 3, and 4 BHK homes, along with exclusive 3 BHK duplex apartments designed for those who appreciate the perfect balance of tranquility and modern city life.

name: Mantra Magnus

developer.name: Mantra Developers
developer.description: Focused on affordable luxury homes in emerging Pune locations.

about: Magnus Elite, located in the vibrant neighborhood of Mundhwa, Pune, is a premium residential project that redefines contemporary living. Offering elegantly designed 1, 2, 3, and 4 BHK apartments and duplexes, the project combines luxury with functionality. With amenities such as a grand clubhouse, swimming pool, gym, landscaped gardens, kids’ play areas, and indoor games, Magnus Elite ensures a well-rounded lifestyle for residents. Its strategic location provides seamless connectivity to Koregaon Park, Kharadi IT hubs, educational institutions, shopping malls, and healthcare centers, making it an ideal address for working professionals and families seeking urban convenience and serene living

name: Mantra Melange

configurations.description: IT-proximity 2 BHK with smart home features

developer.name: Mantra Developers
developer.description: Specializing in tech-friendly homes near Pune's IT hubs.

about: Welcome to Mantra Melange, a thoughtfully crafted residential address on Old Mundhwa Highway, Pune, where contemporary architecture, seamless connectivity, and elevated living come together beautifully. Spread across 8.72 acres, this premium development features elegant glass façade towers, grand double-height entrance lobbies, and thoughtfully planned spaces designed for modern lifestyles. Strategically located with excellent access to Kharadi, Magarpatta, Hadapsar, and Viman Nagar, Mantra Melange keeps you close to Pune's key destinations while offering a peaceful living environment.

name: Mantra Codename Paradise

configurations.description: Premium 3 BHK with balcony and study room

developer.name: Mantra Developers
developer.description: Mantra Developers is a trusted name in Pune real estate, delivering quality homes with modern amenities and timely possession since 2010.

about: Mantra Codename Paradise offers luxurious 2 & 3 BHK homes in Sus, Pune with modern amenities, excellent connectivity to Hinjewadi IT Park, and a serene living environment. The project features landscaped gardens, 24/7 security, and premium finishes throughout.

name: Lodha Mundhwa

configurations.description: Premium 2 BHK with Lodha quality finishes

developer.name: Lodha Group
developer.description: Lodha Group is India's largest real estate developer with iconic projects across Mumbai, Pune, Bangalore, and London.

about: Lodha Mundhwa is an upcoming apartment project in Mundhwa, Pune. It offers 2 and 3 BHK homes designed for modern family living. The project is in the pre-launch stage, which means early buyers can get special prices. The exact sizes and rates will be shared with registered customers first. Right now, the starting price is on request. Lodha Group is known for quality construction and on-time delivery. With possession set for May 2029, you have time to plan your finances. Mundhwa is close to IT parks, schools, and hospitals, making it a smart choice for both living and long-term value. Prices will depend on the floor, view, and size of the apartment. Reach out to our team to get the latest price list and floor plans. Booking early gives you access to the best units at the most attractive rates.

name: Birla Punya

developer.name: Birla Estates
developer.description: Birla Estates brings the trusted Birla legacy to real estate with focus on quality, sustainability, and customer delight.

about: Birla Punya is an opulent residential community in Sangamwadi, Central Pune. It presents 2 BHK, 3 BHK, and 4 BHK lavish residences with huge decks. The newly launched Signature tower under Phase 2 comprises exclusive 4 BHK apartments for the discerning individuals. The apartments are finely designed with imported marble flooring, high-end finishes, and branded CP fittings by Kohler, Grohe, and Toto. These Vastu-compliant homes are well-designed, providing ample space, natural light, and ventilation. Along with this, it also hosts 50+ lifestyle amenities. They are a business lounge, semi-olympic swimming pool, landscaped garden, gymnasium, riverfront promenades, kids’ play area, spa, mini theatre, net cricket, lounge deck, etc.

name: Birla Evem

configurations.description: Premium 3 BHK with smart home features

developer.name: Birla Estates
developer.description: Creating sustainable, premium homes with the Birla promise of quality.

about: Birla Manjari brings a new vision of contemporary living to Pune East, offering a thoughtfully designed residential destination that balances elegance, comfort, and nature. Set across a vast 16.5 acre canvas, the project is enriched with expansive green open areas and carefully curated lifestyle amenities that encourage relaxation, recreation, and community living. The sleek high-rise towers are designed to maximize space, light, and ventilation, creating homes that feel open, airy, and welcoming. Located in the rapidly developing Hadapsar–Manjari belt, the project enjoys seamless access to major business districts, reputed schools, healthcare facilities, and shopping destinations. Every element of the development is crafted to support a well-rounded lifestyle — from peaceful landscaped zones to vibrant social spaces. With smartly planned 2 and 3 BHK residences, Birla Manjari stands as a modern address for families who aspire to live in a well-connected, nature-inspired, and future-ready environment.

name: Shapoorji Tree Cloud

developer.name: Shapoorji Pallonji
developer.description: Shapoorji Pallonji is a 150+ year old legacy brand delivering iconic real estate projects across India.

about: Shapoorji Pallonji Codename Tree Clouds is a residential enclave part of a 225-acre township in Hadapsar, Pune. This enclave presents 7 signature towers, featuring 3 BHK and 4 BHK luxury residences with expansive decks & bay windows. The entire township is nestled in the lush green charm of nature and surrounded by century-old trees. While this landmark’s environment ensures you breathe healthy air, it also offers curated amenities such as a gymnasium, swimming pool, jogging track, landscaped garden, kids’ play area, indoor games area, multipurpose court, banquet hall, senior citizens' area, amphitheatre, etc.

name: Shapoorji Celestia

developer.name: Shapoorji Pallonji
developer.description: India's oldest construction company delivering premium real estate with uncompromising quality.

about: Nestled in the heart of a bustling city, Shapoorji Pallonji Joyville Celestia represents the perfect blend of contemporary living and timeless elegance. Situated in a sought-after residential locale, this development stands as a testament to urban sophistication and modern design, offering residents an oasis of calm amidst the vibrant city.

name: Shapoorji Wildernest

developer.name: Shapoorji Pallonji
developer.description: Delivering quality homes near Pune's IT corridors with the Shapoorji legacy.

about: Shapoorji Pallonji Wildernest is a prestigious residential enclave at SP Kingstown in Hadapsar Annexe, Pune. This aspirational gated community has catered to all your needs by featuring 4 exemplary towers with 3 BHK & 4 BHK Vastu-compliant homes, along with grand villas and elite villaments. The entire township is blessed with a verdant Mango orchard, and every residence is surrounded by 75% open, lush green space. Furthermore, your leisure and necessities will be taken care of by 30+ lifestyle amenities, including an infinity-edge swimming pool, party lawn, gymnasium, cricket pitch, skating rink, cycling track, central mango garden, multipurpose hall, co-working spaces, senior citizen area, amphitheatre, mini theatre, etc.

name: Shapoorji Tree Topia

developer.name: Shapoorji Pallonji
developer.description: Creating connected living experiences with the Shapoorji Pallonji promise.

about: SPRE Jadhavwadi Plots Treetopia by Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate (SPRE) redefine premium plotted living along Hadapsar–Saswad Road, East Pune. Spread across a vast 105-acre hillside landscape, this gated development offers premium NA villa plots with individual 7/12 extracts, making it a rare and legally robust offering in the Jadhavwadi micro-market. Designed around nature, Treetopia Jadhavwadi by Shapoorji Pallonji features over 60% open and green spaces, a 25-acre natural reservoir, scenic hill views, and a well-planned internal layout with wide spine roads, pedestrian-friendly zones, and a dedicated lakeside promenade. A luxury clubhouse set on a 3-acre parcel anchors the lifestyle experience, blending open landscapes with thoughtful modern planning.

name: Shapoorji Villa

developer.name: Shapoorji Pallonji
developer.description: Delivering premium villa experiences with the Shapoorji Pallonji legacy.

about: Tucked away in serene surroundings, the Mango Tree Villas offers a tranquil escape from the hustle and bustle of urban life. These low-rise villas provide a unique sense of privacy and spaciousness, making them an ideal choice for those who cherish a quieter, more exclusive lifestyle.

name: Jhamtani Ace Abundance

developer.name: Jhamtani Group
developer.description: Jhamtani Group delivers quality affordable homes in Pune's emerging locations.

about: Ace Abundance rises at the coveted address of Mundhwa — a setting that places you at the intersection of access and privacy. Close to premium lifestyle hubs, workplaces, gardens, and schools, yet quietly removed from the bustle, it offers the rare privilege of being in the heart of the city and in the calm of your own world. Offering spacious 3, 4 & 4.5 Bed Signature Residences, Ace Abundance celebrates sophistication, wellness, and convenience through 40+ lifestyle amenities crafted for physical, social, and emotional well-being.

name: Kumar Prism

developer.name: Kumar Properties
developer.description: Kumar Properties is a trusted Pune developer with 30+ years of experience in quality construction.

about: Kumar Prism, Magarpatta – Pune offers an elevated lifestyle in one of East Pune’s most sought-after locations. Spread across 2.5 acres, this premium residential development features 2 iconic towers with G+4P+28 floors, thoughtfully designed to capture scenic city and river views. The project blends contemporary architecture with open spaces, creating a refined urban living experience. Residents at Kumar Prism enjoy access to 50+ premium amenities, catering to wellness, leisure, fitness, and social living. Designed for modern families, the project ensures luxury living with effortless connectivity to Magarpatta, IT hubs, business districts, schools, healthcare, and lifestyle destinations, making everyday life convenient and well-connected. Choose from spacious 3 & 4 BHK luxury residences, crafted with efficient layouts, ample natural light, and high-quality finishes. With possession planned for December 2031, Kumar Prism presents a perfect balance of comfort, exclusivity, and long-term value, with homes.

name: Panchshil 57 Avenue

configurations.description: Luxury 3 BHK in prime Koregaon Park
Luxury 3 BHK in prime Koregaon Park

developer.name: Panchshil Realty
developer.description: Panchshil Realty creates iconic luxury properties in Pune's most premium locations.

about: Panchshil 57 Avenue is an exclusive luxury address in Mundhwa, Pune, offering premium 3 & 4 BHK residences across a landmark 17-acre development with 50% open green spaces. Featuring four iconic 27 storey towers, centrally air conditioned homes with VRV/VRF systems, expansive decks, and world-class lifestyle amenities, it delivers an elevated living experience in one of Pune's most sought after locations.

name: Panchshil Lohegaon Plotting

developer.name: Panchshil Realty
developer.description: Creating premium plotted developments in Pune's growth corridors.

about: Bougain Villa at Lohegaon by Panchshil Realty is a premium residential plotted development in Lohegaon, Pune, offering an exclusive opportunity to build your dream home in a serene yet well-connected location. Nestled amidst lush green surroundings, this development seamlessly blends nature, luxury, and modern infrastructure. Each plot at Bougain Villa is thoughtfully designed with wide internal roads, landscaped avenues, and essential utilities to ensure a comfortable and refined living experience. Located close to Pune Airport and key city hubs, Bougain Villa at Lohegaon offers the perfect balance of peace and accessibility, making it one of the most sought-after residential plot communities.

name: Tribeca Lulla Nagar

developer.name: Tribeca Developers
developer.description: Tribeca Developers creates boutique luxury properties in Pune's premium neighborhoods.

about: The Everett by Tribeca is a newly launched ultra-luxury residential project situated in the elite enclave of Lullanagar, Pune South. Spanning a generous 3.6-acre land parcel, this iconic twin-tower landmark soaring 29 storeys high redefines the city’s skyline with a premium, mixed-use ecosystem. The development features a rare, limited collection of vaastu-aligned 3, 4 & 5 BHK luxury apartments and palatial Homes ranging up to 3,320 sq. ft. Designed for ultimate privacy, each residence boasts a striking glass façade, private elevators opening into grand double-height living spaces, and expansive, horizon-facing private decks. Residents enjoy world-class, Tribeca-standard luxury amenities, including an infinity-edge rooftop swimming pool, a sky lounge, and multi-level wellness zones. Strategically located near Pune Cantonment, the property ensures seamless connectivity to major commercial hubs like Magarpatta City IT Park, premium micro-markets like Koregaon Park, and the Pune International Airport.

name: Tribeca Trump Tower

developer.name: Tribeca Developers
developer.description: Creating ultra-luxury branded residences in partnership with global luxury brands.

about: Tribeca Trump World Center is an iconic and distinctive commercial landmark in Koregaon Park Annexe, Pune. It comprises Grade A offices across a varied carpet range. These full glass facade towers give it an appealing look and ensure seamless natural light. This is the first-ever commercial development in India by the Trump organisation. Every office unit features an expansive layout, world-class design, and top-notch specifications. This office development offers flexibility to select from half-floor plate to full-floor plate options. Additional features like a basement parking, podium parking, concierge desk, multi-tier security, CCTV surveillance, and high-speed elevators assure convenience.

name: Magarpatta City Nova Residency

configurations.description: Township living 2 BHK with all amenities

developer.name: Magarpatta City
developer.description: Magarpatta City is India's first integrated township developed by farmers, offering self-sustainable living.

about: Nova Apartments present budget-friendly, comfortable living spaces with essential amenities. For those seeking a premium experience, Nova Residency offers upscale homes with luxurious features and modern conveniences. Elevate your lifestyle further with Nova Elegance, where luxury reaches its pinnacle with spacious 4.5 BHK residences designed for opulence and sophistication.

name: Magarpatta City Nova Elegance

configurations.description: Elegant 4.5 BHK with premium township amenities

developer.name: Magarpatta City
developer.description: Pioneering integrated township living with self-sustainable infrastructure.

about: Introducing Nova Elegance, the highly anticipated successor to an already illustrious luxury housing brand. Building upon the unprecedented standards of living established by its predecessor at Nova, this remarkable development is poised to transcend all expectations, resulting in a living experience that is nothing short of surreal. Nova Elegance aspires to redefine the essence of opulence, ensuring that each resident's lifestyle is elevated to new heights. With an unwavering commitment to luxury, this project seeks to epitomize the very dream of extravagant living. In Nova Elegance, you can anticipate a lifestyle that seamlessly fuses sophistication, comfort, and innovation. This is where the boundaries between the ordinary and the extraordinary blur, as residents are greeted with an abundance of amenities, architectural marvels, and the finest craftsmanship. From the meticulously designed interiors to the meticulously manicured landscapes, every detail reflects a dedication to exceeding your expectations. Nova Elegance transcends the ordinary, creating a haven where your dreams of luxury find their realization. Welcome to Nova Elegance, where luxury and dreams intertwine to create an unparalleled living experience, promising to take you beyond the limits of your imagination. Nova Elegance, where reality meets the dream of luxury

name: Magarpatta City RVC Hornbill

developer.name: Magarpatta City
developer.description: Creating sustainable township living with world-class infrastructure.

about: Hornbill Heights offers thoughtfully designed 2 & 2.5 BHK homes in Loni Kalbhor, Pune, and is part of Riverview City – a well-planned integrated township. Enjoy a complete lifestyle with modern amenities and essential infrastructure within the community, all at comfortable walking distance. Secure your 2 or 2.5 BHK at Hornbill Heights and experience premium township living at its best.

name: Magarpatta City RVC Flamingo

developer.name: Magarpatta City
developer.description: Delivering the finest township living experience in Pune.

about: Welcome to Flamingo Park at River View City Pune, a premium residential offering within the well-planned township of Magarpatta Riverview City, Loni Kalbhor. Developed by the trusted Magarpatta Group, this RERA-approved project offers spacious 2, 2.5 & 3 BHK flats designed for modern living.

name: Sai World One

configurations.description: Compact 2 BHK ideal for first-time buyers

developer.name: Paradise Group
developer.description: Paradise Group is a leading developer in Navi Mumbai with over 25 years of experience in creating premium residential spaces.

about: Sai World One is a lavish gated community opposite the DY Patil Stadium in Nerul, Navi Mumbai. It comprises 2 BHK and 3 BHK luxurious apartments with wide decks. There is also a provision for Jodi flats (2 + 2) and (3 + 3). The apartments come with a huge deck in the living room, a balcony in the master bedroom, and a dry balcony in the kitchen for washing purposes. The apartments are spacious and optimally ventilated. These luxury homes are complemented by curated indulgences like a pickleball court, dual gymnasium, multipurpose sports turf, clubhouse, infinity swimming pool, grand designer lobby, landscaped garden, and more. This gated community also features a G + 38 storey commercial tower and a G + 2 retail development. The commercial tower comes with boutique office spaces and double-height ceilings.

name: Sai World Empire

configurations.description: Compact 2 BHK ideal for singles and couples

developer.name: Paradise Group
developer.description: Paradise Group is a leading developer in Navi Mumbai with over 25 years of experience in creating premium residential and commercial spaces.

about: Sai World Empire, Kharghar is a majestic 18-acre realm where the legacy of six grand empires comes alive in modern luxury. With six towering G+49 marvels offering 2, 3 & 4 BHK regal residences, thisd kingdom is adorned with royal indulgences like Club Athena and the Aswan Spa. Inspired by the opulence of Roman, Egyptian, Greek, French, British, and Spanish dynasties, every space is crafted to echo the splendour of a bygone era.

name: Sai World Dreams

developer.name: Paradise Group
developer.description: Creating affordable luxury homes in Navi Mumbai's growth corridors.

about: Experience a new dimension of luxury at Sai World Dreams Dombivli, a RERA-registered integrated township by the legendary Paradise Group on Kalyan-Shilphata Road. This 18-acre vastu-compliant masterpiece features eight magnificent towers, blending residential elegance with a storey business hub and high-street retail. Currently under construction with a clear possession timeline, Sai World Dreams offers meticulously designed 1, 2, 2.5 & 3 BHK flats. Boasting a 5-star hotel and 6 acres of podium amenities, this landmark ensures unmatched capital appreciation and a global lifestyle.

name: Today Nova Vista Nerul

developer.name: Today Global
developer.description: Today Global Group is a leading developer in Navi Mumbai with focus on quality construction and timely delivery.

about: Today Group presents Nova Vista a thoughtfully crafted residential experience shaped by inward looking philosophy, making it one of the most distinctive project in Nerul. Designed around landscaped courtyards, private decks and curated wellness spaces, it offers a sense of calm within the city’s constant rhythm. Rising as two elegant towers in Nerul, this development stands out as one of the premium residential projects in Nerul, blending low density planning with refined, privacy focused layouts with abundant natural light. As one of the most promising under construction projects in Nerul, Nova Vista brings together modern design and serene living in a truly elevated setting.

name: Today Airoli

developer.name: Today Global
developer.description: Delivering quality homes in Navi Mumbai's IT corridors with timely possession.

about: Jindal Today Airoli introduces a sophisticated paradigm of urban living, featuring bespoke luxury apartments and elite business suites designed for the modern real estate connoisseur. Jindal Today stands as a landmark development by esteemed builders, strategically situated in the high-demand enclave of Sector 48 for premium lifestyle seekers.This dual-purpose venture by Jindal Today Navi Mumbai seamlessly integrates high-end housing with commercial spaces, catering to families and professionals who strictly demand excellence.The architectural design at Jindal Today Thane Belapur Road focuses on vastu-compliant layouts, ensuring each apartment enjoys optimal natural light and superior cross-ventilation throughout.Residents of Today Airoli in Sector 48 will benefit from a high-rise structure featuring podium parking and several levels of sheer residential luxury.

name: Today Kharghar

developer.name: Today Global
developer.description: Creating premium homes in Navi Mumbai's most desirable locations.

about: Today Kharghar is a premium residential project by Today Group in Kharghar, Navi Mumbai, offering modern homes, lifestyle amenities, excellent connectivity, and strong investment potential in a rapidly growing location.

name: Runwal Gardens

developer.name: Runwal Group
developer.description: Runwal Group is one of Mumbai's most trusted developers with 40+ years of experience in quality construction.

about: Runwal Gardens is an exceptional integrated township designed to bring harmony, comfort, and modern living together in one serene address. Nestled in the vibrant suburb of Dombivli, this landmark development offers a lifestyle that beautifully blends nature's charm with world-class conveniences. With 10 acres of lush gardens, 5-star amenities, two reputed schools, and a thriving community atmosphere, every detail at Runwal Gardens is thoughtfully crafted to enrich your everyday life. From the ever-changing beauty of the outdoors to the comfort of elegant residences, this township ensures a truly fulfilling living experience.

name: Lodha Premier

developer.name: Lodha Group
developer.description: India's largest real estate developer bringing Lodha quality to Kalyan with premium homes and amenities.

about: Lodha Premier is a beautiful residential development project located at Manpada, Dombivli. Lodha Premier offers excellently created 1, 2 & 3 BHK lavishly furnished apartments with large sundecks, floor-to-ceiling windows, and designer bath fittingsnestled next to acres of forest greens. Exclusively, Lodha Premier Dombivli also comes along with an array of exceptional modern lifestyle amenities. It is an all-encompassing package that will comprise amenities such as a large sports complex, a school, a business district, a clubhouse, floral gardens, high street retail, and more. Right on the Kalyan-Shil Road, the property itself is close to Dombivli Station, Airoli, and a metro station on the upcoming Kalyan-Taloja line. The locale also features the top essentials such as hospitals, shopping malls, banks, ATMs, and restaurants. Guardian School & Aims Hospital are 15-20 minutes away. Overall, Lodha Codename Premier offers a stunning self-sufficient township that brings the best of modernity to your fingertips.

name: Lodha Opulis

developer.name: Lodha Group
developer.description: Bringing the Lodha promise of quality and timely delivery to Kalyan's growth corridor.

about: Lodha Opulis Palava - a 50-acre masterpiece that redefines luxury living in MMR. Designed by the visionary Hafeez Contractor, this Art Deco-inspired landmark boasts the region’s largest 1 lakh sq. ft. clubhouse, seamlessly integrated with over 30 acres of lush open spaces. A sanctuary of elegance and tranquility, it deals an escape from the city's hustle while embracing sophistication at its finest.
